items.html: And now she receives her Mochin a second time, in an immense illumination, endlessly greater than at first — for at first they were the extract of the Light, and now she takes the Mochin themselves. Then she is finished being corrected, and she takes a second time the twenty-two letters, by means of Ima, and in her Yesod a second door and a second hinge are made; and she receives a second MaNTzePaCh, which is a second MAN [Mayin Nukvin] — all of which are greatly sweetened discernments. And these second ones, which she takes by means of Ima, are called Zion, for they are Rachamim [mercy].
